title: IIT Guwahati – Junior Research Fellow – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) has released a recruitment notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow post for candidates with M.Sc./B.E./B.Tech in Electronics Engineering or equivalent qualification, and candidates can apply online until 28 May 2026 at iitg.ac.in.

basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) has released a recruitment notification for 1 Junior Research Fellow post for candidates with M.Sc./B.E./B.Tech in Electronics Engineering or equivalent qualification, and candidates can apply online until 28 May 2026 at iitg.ac.in.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./B.E./B.Tech in Electronics Engineering or equivalent

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
seo_tags: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati JRF Recruitment 2026
Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati Jobs 2026
